title: 50 Must-Know GK Facts for 2026
content: These are important GK facts for NDA, UPSC, SSC exams. India’s capital is New Delhi. The longest river is Ganga. ISRO launched Gaganyaan mission.

title: India Budget 2026 Highlights
content: The budget focuses on education, defence, and startups. Major reforms are introduced for economic growth.

title: NDA 2026 Study Plan
content: Follow a 90-day strategy. Study daily, revise weekly, and practice mock tests regularly.
